site.title: Andres Ortega
site.tagline: Platform Engineer | CKA | CKAD | CKS | Kubeastronaut

about: Platform Engineer with extensive experience in high-security, large-scale infrastructure, managing and optimizing Kubernetes clusters across production and homelab environments.
Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA), Certified Kubernetes Application Developer (CKAD), Certified Kubernetes Security Specialist (CKS), and pursuing KubeAstronaut from the Linux Foundation.
Background in MLOps — automating and scaling ML pipelines. Currently building and maintaining robust platforms that meet the stringent demands of modern enterprises.
Operating a 4-node k3s homelab with GitOps (ArgoCD), Longhorn, and Cloudflare Tunnel — because production should feel like home.

highlights: Manage and optimize large-scale Kubernetes clusters in high-security environments
Design and maintain CI/CD pipelines using GitLab CI, Argo Workflows, and GitHub Actions
Transitioned from MLOps — automating ML training and inference pipelines at scale
Operate a 4-node k3s homelab with full GitOps workflow (ArgoCD, Longhorn, cert-manager)
